title: chrysochosma candida
intro: Chrysochosma candida, also known as Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Chrysochosma candida include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Chrysochosma candida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for a range of health concerns.
